a:r.a:t: PwC applied the assumptions below to determine HGV base pay, target incentive and target total cash compensation for each benchmarked role. The resulting assumptions and outputs have been reviewed, confirmed, and validated with HGV.
Base pay is estimated to be the average base pay, provided in the TM, file across all US employees that are mapped to the HGV benchmark role.
Hourly rates have been converted to annual amounts at a rate of 2080.
Target incentive is estimated to be equal to target total annual cash to the right minus base salary (if applicable)
Target total annual cash is estimated to be $130,000 (midpoint of the range of $1100k-150k, provided directly by HGV)
Target incentive is estimated to be equal to target total annual cash to the right minus base salary (if applicable)
Target total annual cash is estimated to be $225,000 (midpoint of the range of $200k-250k, provided directly by HGV)
Target incentives estimated to be $45,000 (target amount provided directly by HGV)
Target total cash compensation is estimated to be base salary plus annual target incentive, as defined to the left.
Target incentives estimated by employee based on the “incentive” column within the
2026 Sr Sales Manager Comp Plan Template
Target incentives estimated to be $65,000 (target amount provided directly by HGV)
Target incentives provided by employee within the TM file.
For most employees, target incentives were provided within the TM file. Blanks were estimated by pulling incentive target by job title within the
2026 Comp Plan Template Dir+ with Target Pay & Build
Target incentives estimated based on job title and site mapping from the
Sales and Marketing Comp Plan Summary
Target incentives estimated by employee based on the incentive target within 2
026 Comp Plan Template Local Marketing Leadership eff 1.1.26
For most employees, target incentives were provided within the TM file. Blanks were estimated by pulling incentive target by employee within the
2026 Comp Plan Template Local Marketing Leadership eff 1.1.26
For most employees, target incentives were provided within the TM file. Blanks were estimated by pulling incentive target by job title within the
2026 Comp Plan Template Dir+ with Target Pay & Build
Target incentives estimated based on job title per the
. Where specific targets were not provided in the file the following assumptions were used:
Agent Outbound: $16,000 (10 packages at a rate of 140/package each month)
Agent Owner Marketing: $18,720 (416 packages annually at a rate of 45/package
Target incentives estimated based on job title per the
. Where specific targets were not provided in the file the following assumptions were used:
Agent Concierge: $5,250 (350 tours at a rate of 1.0 + 350*.25 for the show rate component each month)
Target incentives estimated based on job title per the
